description_long: This object is a compact fax machine with a rectangular, boxy form and rounded edges, primarily colored in dark and light gray tones. The front features a wide output slot from which a sheet of paper is emerging, while the top has a recessed tray holding another sheet, indicating the input area. The sides are smooth and unadorned, with a single button visible on the right side of the front panel. The back of the machine displays a panel with several circular ports or indicator lights, suggesting connectivity or status indicators. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on functionality and ease of access to paper trays and controls.
description: A compact, rectangular fax machine with dark and light gray panels, visible paper trays, and a simple control interface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the output slot with paper emerging and a single button on the right side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth side panel and the angled paper trays with sheets inserted.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a panel with multiple circular ports or indicators and the back of the input tray.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side panel and the paper trays with inserted sheets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A single button is located on the right side of the front panel; no display screens or indicator lights are visible on the main control area.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is recessed into the top of the machine, oriented vertically to hold sheets upright; it appears to accommodate a small stack of paper with no visible adjustable guides or covers.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is located at the front lower center of the machine, with paper emerging directly outward; no additional guides or trays are visible.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is present or visibly attached to the machine.
